items.item: DDU Digital Design Unit, TU Darmstadt

Radial shape signature for planar boundary curves: rotates each curve into its canonical rest position (min-bbox-edge orientation), casts N evenly spaced rays from the centroid, and returns the distance to the first boundary intersection together with the boundary tangent at that intersection. Mirrors the backend `radial_signature` module.
Converts to collection of integer numbers
Converts to collection of boolean values
Converts to collection of integer numbers
